    NeighborPrev = case {I > 0, I < N - 1} of
        {true, true} -> Nums !! (I - 1);
        {false, true} -> Nums !! (N - 1); % i=0, prev is n-1
        {true, false} -> Nums !! (I - 1);
        {false, false} -> Nums !! (N - 1) % Should not happen if N >= 2
    end,
    NeighborNext = case {I > 0, I < N - 1} of
        {true, true} -> Nums !! (I + 1);
        {true, false} -> Nums !! 0; % i=n-1, next is 0
        {false, true} -> Nums !! (I + 1);
        {false, false} -> Nums !! 0 % Should not happen if N >= 2
    end,
    % Re-implementing neighbor logic based on problem description for clarity/correctness
    Pred = if I == 0 -> Nums !! (N - 1); true -> Nums !! (I - 1) end,
    Succ = if I == N - 1 -> Nums !! 0; true -> Nums !! (I + 1) end,
    Nums !! I > Pred and Nums !! I > Succ.
